org.apache.paimon.crosspartition

Class SkipNewExistingProcessor

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.crosspartition.SkipNewExistingProcessor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ExistingProcessor

    public class SkipNewExistingProcessor
extends Object
implements ExistingProcessor
    A ExistingProcessor to skip new record.
